description: Evaluation fixtures for Tarjan articulation point protection in open loops

fixtures.name: Critical blocker in star graph
fixtures.description: An open loop connected to a hub node that connects 5 workstreams should be protected

openLoop.title: Resolve FFB hub integration issue
openLoop.summary: Critical blocker affecting all FFB workstreams

fixtures.name: Regular task in cycle graph
fixtures.description: An open loop in a cyclic dependency should not be protected (cycles are resilient)

openLoop.title: Update OAuth provider settings
openLoop.summary: Regular maintenance task for OAuth integration

fixtures.name: Bridge node between two projects
fixtures.description: A task connected to a node that bridges two distinct knowledge clusters should be protected

bridge.value: Shared library between A and B

openLoop.title: Fix shared library compatibility issue
openLoop.summary: Blocking integration between Project A and Project B

fixtures.name: Line graph endpoint
fixtures.description: Endpoint of a line graph is not an articulation point and should not be protected

fixtures.name: Line graph internal node
fixtures.description: Internal node of a line graph IS an articulation point and should be protected

openLoop.title: Fix data transformation logic
openLoop.summary: Middle step that connects ingestion and export

fixtures.name: Orphan loop with no graph connections
fixtures.description: An open loop not connected to any facts should not be protected

openLoop.title: Research competitor pricing
openLoop.summary: Standalone research task with no knowledge graph links

fixtures.name: Multiple articulation points
fixtures.description: Complex graph with multiple articulation points - loop should be protected

openLoop.title: Resolve AP2 integration issue
openLoop.summary: Middle bridge node between two clusters

fixtures.name: Stale loop restoration
fixtures.description: A stale open loop connected to an articulation point should be restored to 'open'

openLoop.title: Fix core router timeout
openLoop.summary: Critical service affecting multiple downstream systems

fixtures.name: Entity match but no links
fixtures.description: Open loop has entity that exists but fact has no graph links - should not be protected

openLoop.title: Update orphan documentation
openLoop.summary: Task for entity with unlinked facts

fixtures.name: High priority non-critical loop
fixtures.description: High priority alone should not protect - must be articulation point

openLoop.title: Critical urgent task
openLoop.summary: High priority but in resilient cycle graph

expected.note: Priority alone doesn't trigger protection - only graph topology

passCriteria.description: All fixtures must pass for Phase 1 to be considered complete
